steps.title: Match each term to an area
steps.content:
The park has $3$ hectares and the residential area has $28$ hectares. In the equation
$$3x+28y=4{,}291$$
the term $3x$ represents the trees in the park.

steps.title: Interpret the variable
steps.content: Because $3$ is the number of hectares in the park, $x$ must be the number of trees per hectare in the park. The answer is A.
